# External asset attribution

## Kenney.nl (CC0 1.0)

Integrated curated subsets from:

- [Nature Kit](https://kenney.nl/assets/nature-kit)
- [Fantasy Town Kit](https://kenney.nl/assets/fantasy-town-kit)
- [Furniture Kit](https://kenney.nl/assets/furniture-kit)
- [Castle Kit](https://kenney.nl/assets/castle-kit)
- [Space Kit](https://kenney.nl/assets/space-kit) — Field Skiff / hangar
- [Platformer Kit](https://kenney.nl/assets/platformer-kit) — chests, crates, barrels
- [Racing Kit](https://kenney.nl/assets/racing-kit) — parked cars
- [Car Kit](https://kenney.nl/assets/car-kit) — adventure SUV

Kenney assets are public domain (CC0). Digital Frontier rematerializes them with `WorldPalette` / toon nearest filtering for visual consistency.

## Sketchfab (queued)

See `docs/ASSET_INTEGRATION.md` and `docs/ASSET_PROTOTYPE.md` for recommended CC-BY models and `tools/fetch_sketchfab.py`.
Do not redistribute Sketchfab downloads without satisfying the model’s license attribution.

## Creature policy

Partner creatures (Emberling, Sparkbit, Tidepup) are original Digital Frontier kits.
Do not import Digimon / franchise character models — even for prototyping.
